overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing an FBI agent exploring a foggy Pacific Northwest harbor town. The character walks along a wooden pier past a 'Coffee World' tourist attraction, transitions onto a wet town street, and follows people in large coffee cup costumes toward a gated waterfront area.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier with Coffee World tourist display

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden pier, observing the harbor and the large deer statue display

entered.detail: large decorative deer statue standing on hay bales with Coffee World signage
weathered wooden railings lining both sides of the pier walkway
calm water of the harbor with mist rising from the surface
rustic wooden warehouse building with multiple stories and balconies
misty forested mountains visible across the harbor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy harbor pier with the FBI agent standing near a Coffee World tourist attraction featuring a large deer statue. The character walks along the wooden boardwalk, passing weathered railings with the calm harbor water and misty mountains visible in the background. The atmosphere is quiet and overcast, with no other people present on the pier.

scene_state.functional_zone: small town main street with wooden storefronts

events.description: exits wooden pier onto asphalt town street with wooden buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the town street, passing by a pedestrian and observing the wooden architecture

notable_agents.action: man in plaid shirt walking past the character on the right side

entered.detail: wet asphalt street surface reflecting the overcast sky
rustic wooden commercial buildings lining the street
yellow pickup truck parked along the right side of the street
American flag hanging from a building facade
wooden utility poles with traffic lights suspended over the street

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the pier onto a wet asphalt town street lined with rustic wooden buildings. A man in a plaid shirt walks past on the right, and a yellow truck is parked further down the road. The Coffee World deer statue becomes visible in the far background as the character moves deeper into the town.

scene_state.functional_zone: town street with festival decorations and costumed characters

events.description: encounters people wearing large Oh Deer coffee cup costumes walking down the street

agents.ego_description: following the people in large coffee cup costumes down the wet main street

notable_agents.action: person wearing large cylindrical Oh Deer coffee cup costume walking ahead
second person in matching coffee cup costume walking alongside

entered.detail: painted sign for Oh Deer Diner on the wooden building facade
vintage style street lamps along the left sidewalk
temporary metal crowd control barriers along the right side
group of deer statues visible in the distance near the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The character walks down the main street following two people wearing large Oh Deer coffee cup costumes. The street is lined with wooden buildings including the Oh Deer Diner, and metal barriers are set up along the right side. In the distance, deer statues from the Coffee World attraction become visible again as the character approaches the waterfront area.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront approach with metal fencing and deck seating

events.description: slows down while approaching the gated entrance to the pier area

agents.ego_description: approaching the metal gate at the waterfront, following the costumed character ahead

notable_agents.action: person in coffee cup costume entering through the metal gate ahead

entered.detail: chain link fence with gate blocking access to the pier area
wooden decking with outdoor seating visible through the fence
red and white life preserver mounted on the building wall
wooden tables and chairs stacked near the fence line
harbor water visible again through the fence on the left

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a metal chain-link gate at the waterfront, following the coffee cup costume character who is entering the restricted pier area. Wooden deck furniture and a life preserver are visible on the right, while the harbor water reappears on the left. The deer statues stand in the background beyond the gate as the character slows down near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, foggy harbor pier into the heart of a rustic town before returning to a restricted waterfront entrance. It begins with the FBI agent walking along a wooden boardwalk past a large deer statue, with misty mountains and calm water framing the overcast atmosphere. As the character leaves the pier, the scene shifts onto a wet asphalt street lined with wooden buildings, passing a man in a plaid shirt and a parked yellow truck. The camera then follows two people in large coffee cup costumes down the main street past the Oh Deer Diner and metal barriers, while the deer statues reappear in the distance. Finally, the movement leads toward a chain-link gate at the waterfront, passing wooden deck furniture and a life preserver as the character follows the costumed figure into the restricted pier area.
